<?php /** * Copyright (c) Ivan Akimov. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @see https://github.com/vinkla/hashids */ namespace Hashids\Math; class Gmp implements MathInterface { public function add($a, $b) { return gmp_add($a, $b); } public function multiply($a, $b) { return gmp_mul($a, $b); } public function divide($a, $b) { return gmp_div_q($a, $b); } public function mod($n, $d) { return gmp_mod($n, $d); } public function greaterThan($a, $b) { return gmp_cmp($a, $b) > 0; } public function intval($a) { return gmp_intval($a); } public function strval($a) { return gmp_strval($a); } public function get($a) { return gmp_init($a); } }
